title: MEDICAL SERVICES - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER CLINIC MEDICAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult medical care, including yearly exams for all adults and immunizations such as COVID-19 and flu vaccines. Other services offered are primary care, pediatrics, prenatal care and pregnancy support services, family planning, circumcision, immunizations, orthopedics, diabetes prevention and disease screening, medication assistance, behavioral health, and access to 24-hour on-call doctors available. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6380 FAX (541) 639-4142 Health Records Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Colorectal Cancer Detection Community Clinics COVID-19 Diagnostic Tests COVID-19 Treatment General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Newborn Screening Pediatrics Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
